title: ZOMG there is a rebuild manga
display_title: ZOMG there is a rebuild manga
wikitext:
[]: ZOMG there is a rebuild manga?!?!?! Post by PIN_H34D » Thu Sep 03, 2009 11:11 am this may be a noob question, but i hear a lot of people talking about Mari in a manga ans bla bla bla... there is a rebuild manga? what is it called? i must read it!

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 03, 2009 11:17 am You're confused. There is no Rebuild of Evangelion manga. What we were discussing was the unlikely possibility that Mari could potentially show up in the Sadamoto manga. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=276841
